Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Marc Voisenat of the law offices of Marc Voisenat (510-263-8664) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF RAUL VASQUEZ'S Motion Quash Subpoena And Motion For Protective Order Re: Re: May 16 Notice Of Deposition Subpoena For Personal Appearance And Production Of Documents And Thing Of Plaintiffs Attorney Marc Voisenat is GRANTED. California case law is clear that the deposition of counsel is to be allowed only in extraordinary situations. The fact that counsel may be a percipient witness does not mean that the deposition will be allowed unless there are no alternative means of obtaining the information. Here, the Court finds that Defendant has not shown that there no alternative means of obtaining the information including by taking the deposition of Plaintiff. This ruling is without prejudice to Defendant filing a motion for reconsideration if its efforts to obtain the information are unsuccessful. Written order is signed and filed.
